utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. TRAVEL_DATES: Required - specific dates for the trip. Final package includes 'July 15-19, 2024' ✓

3. TRANSPORTATION: Required - flight details with costs. Final package includes Budget Airlines flights BA2847 and BA2856 with times, confirmation code RME4579SLV, and cost €400 ✓

4. ACCOMMODATION: Required - hotel selection with costs. Final package includes Cityscape Hotel Rome with full address, room type (2 Double Rooms with city view), check-in/out dates, reservation code CSH789456, and cost €600 ✓

5. ACTIVITIES: Required - selected activities with costs. Final package includes three activities: City Walking Tour (July 16 with time and booking number), Golf Day at Golf Club Roma (July 17 with time and booking number), and Fine Dining at Ristorante Il Convivio Troiani (July 18 with time, allergy note, and booking number), with total cost €410 ✓

6. ADDITIONAL_SERVICES: Required - any extra services with costs. Final package includes 'None required' which is a valid response indicating this item was considered ✓

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: Required - complete cost breakdown. Final package includes €1,410 total with breakdown showing it's €290 under the €1,700 budget limit ✓

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified with all necessary details including costs, confirmation/booking codes, dates, times, and addresses where applicable.
